title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a fast way to equip computers with its agent capabilities in about one minute. It is presented as a named product on the homepage.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announcement
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company highlights deep training-level optimization for agent core capabilities.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI presented GLM-5 as its new flagship base model for agent engineering, claiming open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also cites strong results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model described as delivering standout performance at the 100B-class level. It is also promoted as supporting tool calling and 128K long context.

title: AutoGLM agent model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: 2025 annual results announcement schedule
summary: Zhipu AI announced that the company, listed in Hong Kong under stock code 02513, will release its full-year 2025 results on March 31, 2026. This is a corporate financial event disclosed in the latest updates section.

title: First performance report published
summary: Zhipu AI published its first performance report, describing it as an exploration of the upper bounds of AGI intelligence. The item appears in the company's latest news section dated 2026/03/31.

title: Zhongguancun Indigenous Large Model Industry Alliance first members' meeting
summary: Zhipu AI reported the results of the first members' meeting of the Zhongguancun Indigenous Large Model Industry Alliance, held on August 19, 2025. The meeting formally reviewed and approved foundational alliance documents and organizational matters.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for students interested in foundation model work.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview availability of the model for public evaluation or comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a formal model release in the company's model lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This is a named product/model release from the company.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built on a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes improved reasoning capabilities for math-related tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model in the Seed family.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro, promoted with the theme 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The announcement suggests a multimodal model focused on integrated audio and visual generation or understanding.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations through evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free permanent access to the Baichuan-M3-Plus API for organizations serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-enhanced medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Turbo as a newly released model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. The company says it improves usability by more than 10% over Baichuan4, lowers deployment and inference costs, and delivers faster first-token and token streaming speeds.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI launched Baichuan4-Air, a newly released MoE model featuring its PRI architecture and enterprise-focused optimization. The company highlights very low inference pricing and strong industry-leading performance with improved timeliness over major international MoE models.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced for commercial use
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning, low hallucination rates, and consultation capabilities. The company describes it as a 235B-parameter model with leading open HealthBench performance.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. It is presented as a 32B-parameter model with 32K context and top open HealthBench results.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as Baichuan's first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The 14B-parameter model is described as trained with 20T of medical-enhanced data and supports 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B announced with major capability gains over prior generation
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual model. The company says it improves math by 49%, coding by 46%, safety by 37%, logical reasoning by 25%, and semantic understanding by 15% compared with the previous 13B model.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI introduced “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical outcomes.

title: 01.AI one-box LLM solution machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM one-box solution machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as an open-source Mixture-of-Experts large language model and described it as achieving global state-of-the-art performance. The mention positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.

2025-07-31 StepMesh: A Communication Library for Attention-FFN Disaggregation This article delves into the technical details and design choices of StepMesh, sharing our insights and considerations regarding the communication requirements for AF Separation systems.
2025-07-24 Step-Audio 2: Breakthrough in End-to-End Speech Modeling Technology Step-Audio 2 is an end-to-end multimodal large language model engineered for industrial applications

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
